Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**

  The Univalent Category of Abelian Groups

  This file shows properties of the category of abelian groups, which is defined in Magma.v. For
  example, it shows that the category is univalent.

  The category has an additive structure. The trivial abelian group is its zero object, with the
  zero arrows given by 0(x) = 0. Pointwise addition (f + g)(x) = f x + g x gives a binary operation
  on the morphisms and the direct product of abelian groups gives a direct sum.

  The category has kernels and cokernels, with the cokernel of f: A → B given by B / Im f.

  In this category, one can formulate more directly what it means to be a kernel: for morphisms
  f : X → Y and g : Y → Z, if f · g = 0, if f is monic and if the fiber above any element in Y that
  maps to 0 : Z is inhabited, X is the kernel of g.

  Contents
  1. The univalent category of abelian groups [abelian_group_univalent_category]
  2. The additive structure
  2.1. The abelian group structure on homsets [abgr_WithAbGrops]
  2.2. The preadditive structure [abgr_PreAdditive]
  2.3. The zero object [abgr_Zero]
  2.4. Direct sums [abgr_isBinDirectSum]
  2.5. The additive structure [abgr_Additive]
  3. Kernels and Cokernels
  3.1. Kernels [abgr_Kernels]
  3.2. Cokernels [abgr_Cokernels]
  4. Monics are inclusions and Epis are surjections
  4.1. Epis are surjections [abgr_epi_issurjective]
  4.2. Monics are inclusions [abgr_monic_isInjective]
  5. Monics are kernels of their cokernels and epis are cokernels of their kernels
  5.1. Monics are Kernels [abgr_monic_kernel]
  5.2. Epis are Cokernels [abgr_epi_cokernel]
  6. The category of abelian groups is an abelian category [abgr_Abelian]
  7. An elementwise criterion for isKernel [abgr_isKernel_Criteria]

 *)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.BinaryOperations.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Groups.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Monoids.


Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Epis.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.CategoriesWithBinOps.

Notation "0" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ + _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "- _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ - _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PreAdditive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Additive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Abelian.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Zero.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coequalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Kernels.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Cokernels.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinDirectSums.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.Product.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.Magma.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.Group.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope addmonoid.
Local Open Scope abgr.

(** * 1. The univalent category of abelian groups *)

Definition is_univalent_abelian_group_disp_cat
  : is_univalent_disp abelian_group_disp_cat
  := dirprod_disp_cat_is_univalent _ _
    is_univalent_group_disp_cat
    is_univalent_abelian_magma_disp_cat.

Definition is_univalent_abelian_group_category
  : is_univalent abelian_group_category
  := is_univalent_total_category
    is_univalent_magma_category
    is_univalent_abelian_group_disp_cat.

Definition abelian_group_univalent_category
  : univalent_category
  := make_univalent_category abelian_group_category is_univalent_abelian_group_category.

(** * 2. The additive structure *)
(** ** 2.1. The abelian group structure on homsets *)


precategoryWithBinOpsData abelian_group_category


precategoryWithBinOpsData abelian_group_category

  exact @abgrshombinop.
Defined.

Definition abgr_WithBinOps : precategoryWithBinOps :=
  make_precategoryWithBinOps abelian_group_category abgr_WithBinOpsData.


categoryWithAbgrops


categoryWithAbgrops

  
precategoryWithBinOps
categoryWithAbgropsData ?PB

  
precategoryWithBinOps
 exact abgr_WithBinOps.
  
categoryWithAbgropsData abgr_WithBinOps
 
∏ x y : abgr_WithBinOps, isabgrop (to_binop x y)

    exact @abgrshomabgr_isabgrop.
Defined.

(** ** 2.2. The preadditive structure *)


isPreAdditive abgr_WithAbGrops


isPreAdditive abgr_WithAbGrops

  
∏ (x y z : abgr_WithAbGrops)
(f : abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ x, y ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)
∏ (x y z : abgr_WithAbGrops)
(f : abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ y, z ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)

  (* Precomposition with morphism is linear *)
  
∏ (x y z : abgr_WithAbGrops)
(f : abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ x, y ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)
 
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ X, Y ⟧
ismonoidfun (to_premor Z f)

    
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ X, Y ⟧
isbinopfun (to_premor Z f)
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ X, Y ⟧
to_premor Z f 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat

    
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ X, Y ⟧
isbinopfun (to_premor Z f)
 
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ X, Y ⟧
∏ x x' : (Y --> Z)%abgrcat,
to_premor Z f (x + x') =
to_premor Z f x + to_premor Z f x'
 
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g, h: (Y --> Z)%abgrcat
to_premor Z f (g + h) =
to_premor Z f g + to_premor Z f h
 
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g, h: (Y --> Z)%abgrcat
∏ x : X,
to_premor Z f (g + h) x =
(to_premor Z f g + to_premor Z f h) x
 
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g, h: (Y --> Z)%abgrcat
x: X
to_premor Z f (g + h) x =
(to_premor Z f g + to_premor Z f h) x
 reflexivity.
    
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ X, Y ⟧
to_premor Z f 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat
 
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ X, Y ⟧
∏ x : X, to_premor Z f 0%abgrcat x = 0%abgrcat x
 
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ X, Y ⟧
x: X
to_premor Z f 0%abgrcat x = 0%abgrcat x
 reflexivity.
  (* Postcomposition with morphism is linear *)
  
∏ (x y z : abgr_WithAbGrops)
(f : abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ y, z ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)
 
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
ismonoidfun (to_postmor X f)

    
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
isbinopfun (to_postmor X f)
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
to_postmor X f 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat

    
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
isbinopfun (to_postmor X f)
 
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
∏ x x' : (X --> Y)%abgrcat,
to_postmor X f (x + x') =
to_postmor X f x + to_postmor X f x'
 
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
g, h: (X --> Y)%abgrcat
to_postmor X f (g + h) =
to_postmor X f g + to_postmor X f h
 
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
g, h: (X --> Y)%abgrcat
∏ x : X,
to_postmor X f (g + h) x =
(to_postmor X f g + to_postmor X f h) x
 
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
g, h: (X --> Y)%abgrcat
x: X
to_postmor X f (g + h) x =
(to_postmor X f g + to_postmor X f h) x

      
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
g, h: (X --> Y)%abgrcat
x: X
f (g x) + f (h x) =
(to_postmor X f g + to_postmor X f h) x

      reflexivity.
    
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
to_postmor X f 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat
 
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
∏ x : X, to_postmor X f 0%abgrcat x = 0%abgrcat x
 
X, Y, Z: abgr_WithAbGrops
f: abgr_WithAbGrops ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
x: X
to_postmor X f 0%abgrcat x = 0%abgrcat x
 exact (monoidfununel (f : abelian_group_morphism _ _)).
Qed.

Definition abgr_PreAdditive : PreAdditive :=
  make_PreAdditive abgr_WithAbGrops abgr_isPreAdditive.

(** ** 2.3. The zero object *)

Section def_abgr_zero.

  
a: abelian_group_category
t: abelian_group_morphism unitabgr a
t = unel_abelian_group_morphism unitabgr (a : abgr)

  
a: abelian_group_category
t: abelian_group_morphism unitabgr a
t = unel_abelian_group_morphism unitabgr (a : abgr)

    
a: abelian_group_category
t: abelian_group_morphism unitabgr a
∏ x : unitabgr,
t x = unel_abelian_group_morphism unitabgr a x
 
a: abelian_group_category
t: abelian_group_morphism unitabgr a
x: unitabgr
t x = unel_abelian_group_morphism unitabgr a x

    
a: abelian_group_category
t: abelian_group_morphism unitabgr a
x: unitabgr
t x = t 0
 
a: abelian_group_category
t: abelian_group_morphism unitabgr a
x: unitabgr
x = 0
 apply isProofIrrelevantUnit.
  Qed.

  
a: abelian_group_category
t: abelian_group_morphism a unitabgr
t = unel_abelian_group_morphism a unitabgr

  
a: abelian_group_category
t: abelian_group_morphism a unitabgr
t = unel_abelian_group_morphism a unitabgr

    
a: abelian_group_category
t: abelian_group_morphism a unitabgr
∏ x : a,
t x = unel_abelian_group_morphism a unitabgr x
 
a: abelian_group_category
t: abelian_group_morphism a unitabgr
x: a
t x = unel_abelian_group_morphism a unitabgr x
 apply isProofIrrelevantUnit.
  Qed.

  
isZero unitabgr

  
isZero unitabgr

    
∏ a : abelian_group_category,
iscontr (abelian_group_category ⟦ unitabgr, a ⟧)
∏ a : abelian_group_category,
iscontr (abelian_group_category ⟦ a, unitabgr ⟧)

    
∏ a : abelian_group_category,
iscontr (abelian_group_category ⟦ unitabgr, a ⟧)
 
a: abelian_group_category
iscontr (abelian_group_category ⟦ unitabgr, a ⟧)
 
a: abelian_group_category
abelian_group_category ⟦ unitabgr, a ⟧
a: abelian_group_category
∏ t : abelian_group_category ⟦ unitabgr, a ⟧, t = ?x

      
a: abelian_group_category
abelian_group_category ⟦ unitabgr, a ⟧
 exact (unel_abelian_group_morphism _ a).
      
a: abelian_group_category
∏ t : abelian_group_category ⟦ unitabgr, a ⟧,
t = unel_abelian_group_morphism unitabgr a
 
a: abelian_group_category
t: abelian_group_category ⟦ unitabgr, a ⟧
t = unel_abelian_group_morphism unitabgr a
 exact (isconnectedfromunitabgr a t).
    
∏ a : abelian_group_category,
iscontr (abelian_group_category ⟦ a, unitabgr ⟧)
 
a: abelian_group_category
iscontr (abelian_group_category ⟦ a, unitabgr ⟧)
 
a: abelian_group_category
abelian_group_category ⟦ a, unitabgr ⟧
a: abelian_group_category
∏ t : abelian_group_category ⟦ a, unitabgr ⟧, t = ?x

      
a: abelian_group_category
abelian_group_category ⟦ a, unitabgr ⟧
 exact (unel_abelian_group_morphism a _).
      
a: abelian_group_category
∏ t : abelian_group_category ⟦ a, unitabgr ⟧,
t = unel_abelian_group_morphism a unitabgr
 
a: abelian_group_category
t: abelian_group_category ⟦ a, unitabgr ⟧
t = unel_abelian_group_morphism a unitabgr
 exact (isconnectedtounitabgr a t).
  Defined.

  Definition abgr_Zero : Zero abelian_group_category := make_Zero unitabgr abgr_isZero.

  
A, B: abgr
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A B =
unel_abelian_group_morphism A B

  
A, B: abgr
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A B =
unel_abelian_group_morphism A B

    
A, B: abgr
∏ x : A,
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A B x =
unel_abelian_group_morphism A B x
 
A, B: abgr
x: A
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A B x =
unel_abelian_group_morphism A B x
 reflexivity.
  Qed.

End def_abgr_zero.

(** ** 2.4. Direct sums *)

Section DirectSums.

  
A, B: abgr
isbinopfun (λ X : abgrdirprod A B, dirprod_pr1 X)

  
A, B: abgr
isbinopfun (λ X : abgrdirprod A B, dirprod_pr1 X)

    
A, B: abgr
x, x': abgrdirprod A B
dirprod_pr1 (x + x') = dirprod_pr1 x + dirprod_pr1 x'
 reflexivity.
  Qed.

  Definition abgr_DirectSumPr1 (A B : abgr) : abelian_group_category⟦abgrdirprod A B, A⟧ :=
    make_abelian_group_morphism _ (abgr_DirectSumPr1_isbinopfun A B).

  
A, B: abgr
isbinopfun (λ X : abgrdirprod A B, dirprod_pr2 X)

  
A, B: abgr
isbinopfun (λ X : abgrdirprod A B, dirprod_pr2 X)

    
A, B: abgr
x, x': abgrdirprod A B
dirprod_pr2 (x + x') = dirprod_pr2 x + dirprod_pr2 x'
 reflexivity.
  Qed.

  Definition abgr_DirectSumPr2 (A B : abgr) : abelian_group_category⟦abgrdirprod A B, B⟧ :=
    make_abelian_group_morphism _ (abgr_DirectSumPr2_isbinopfun A B).

  
A, B: abgr
isbinopfun (λ a : A, make_dirprod a 0)

  
A, B: abgr
isbinopfun (λ a : A, make_dirprod a 0)

    
A, B: abgr
x, x': A
make_dirprod (x + x') 0 =
make_dirprod x 0 + make_dirprod x' 0

    
A, B: abgr
x, x': A
pr1 (make_dirprod (x + x') 0) =
pr1 (make_dirprod x 0 + make_dirprod x' 0)
A, B: abgr
x, x': A
pr2 (make_dirprod (x + x') 0) =
pr2 (make_dirprod x 0 + make_dirprod x' 0)

      
A, B: abgr
x, x': A
pr1 (make_dirprod (x + x') 0) =
pr1 (make_dirprod x 0 + make_dirprod x' 0)
 reflexivity.
      
A, B: abgr
x, x': A
pr2 (make_dirprod (x + x') 0) =
pr2 (make_dirprod x 0 + make_dirprod x' 0)
 
A, B: abgr
x, x': A
pr2 (make_dirprod x 0 + make_dirprod x' 0) =
pr2 (make_dirprod (x + x') 0)
 apply (runax B).
  Qed.

  Definition abgr_DirectSumIn1 (A B : abgr) : abelian_group_category⟦A, abgrdirprod A B⟧ :=
    make_abelian_group_morphism _ (abgr_DirectSumIn1_isbinopfun A B).

  
A, B: abgr
isbinopfun (λ b : B, make_dirprod 0 b)

  
A, B: abgr
isbinopfun (λ b : B, make_dirprod 0 b)

    
A, B: abgr
x, x': B
make_dirprod 0 (x + x') =
make_dirprod 0 x + make_dirprod 0 x'
 
A, B: abgr
x, x': B
pr1 (make_dirprod 0 (x + x')) =
pr1 (make_dirprod 0 x + make_dirprod 0 x')
A, B: abgr
x, x': B
pr2 (make_dirprod 0 (x + x')) =
pr2 (make_dirprod 0 x + make_dirprod 0 x')

    
A, B: abgr
x, x': B
pr1 (make_dirprod 0 (x + x')) =
pr1 (make_dirprod 0 x + make_dirprod 0 x')
 
A, B: abgr
x, x': B
pr1 (make_dirprod 0 x + make_dirprod 0 x') =
pr1 (make_dirprod 0 (x + x'))
 apply (runax A).
    
A, B: abgr
x, x': B
pr2 (make_dirprod 0 (x + x')) =
pr2 (make_dirprod 0 x + make_dirprod 0 x')
 reflexivity.
  Qed.

  Definition abgr_DirectSumIn2 (A B : abgr) : abelian_group_category⟦B, abgrdirprod A B⟧ :=
    make_abelian_group_morphism _ (abgr_DirectSumIn2_isbinopfun A B).

  
A, B: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B =
identity A

  
A, B: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B =
identity A

    
A, B: abgr
∏ x : A,
(abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B) x =
identity A x
 
A, B: abgr
x: A
(abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B) x =
identity A x
 reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B =
identity B

  
A, B: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B =
identity B

    
A, B: abgr
∏ x : B,
(abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B) x =
identity B x
 
A, B: abgr
x: B
(abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B) x =
identity B x
 reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B =
to_unel A B

  
A, B: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B =
to_unel A B

    
A, B: abgr
∏ x : A,
(abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B) x =
to_unel A B x
 
A, B: abgr
x: A
(abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B) x =
to_unel A B x
 reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B =
to_unel B A

  
A, B: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B =
to_unel B A

    
A, B: abgr
∏ x : B,
(abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B) x =
to_unel B A x
 
A, B: abgr
x: B
(abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B · abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B) x =
to_unel B A x
 reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
abgrshombinop
  (abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B)
  (abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B) =
identity_abelian_group_morphism (abgrdirprod A B)

  
A, B: abgr
abgrshombinop
  (abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B)
  (abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B) =
identity_abelian_group_morphism (abgrdirprod A B)

    
A, B: abgr
∏ x : abgrdirprod A B,
abgrshombinop
  (abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B)
  (abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B) x =
identity_abelian_group_morphism (abgrdirprod A B) x
 
A, B: abgr
x: abgrdirprod A B
abgrshombinop
  (abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B)
  (abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B) x =
identity_abelian_group_morphism (abgrdirprod A B) x
 
A, B: abgr
x: abgrdirprod A B
pr1
  (abgrshombinop
     (abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B)
     (abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B) x) =
pr1
  (identity_abelian_group_morphism (abgrdirprod A B) x)
A, B: abgr
x: abgrdirprod A B
pr2
  (abgrshombinop
     (abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B)
     (abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B) x) =
pr2
  (identity_abelian_group_morphism (abgrdirprod A B) x)

    
A, B: abgr
x: abgrdirprod A B
pr1
  (abgrshombinop
     (abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B)
     (abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B) x) =
pr1
  (identity_abelian_group_morphism (abgrdirprod A B) x)
 apply (runax A).
    
A, B: abgr
x: abgrdirprod A B
pr2
  (abgrshombinop
     (abgr_DirectSumPr1 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn1 A B)
     (abgr_DirectSumPr2 A B · abgr_DirectSumIn2 A B) x) =
pr2
  (identity_abelian_group_morphism (abgrdirprod A B) x)
 apply (lunax B).
  Qed.

  
X, Y: abgr
isBinDirectSum (abgr_DirectSumIn1 X Y)
  (abgr_DirectSumIn2 X Y) (abgr_DirectSumPr1 X Y)
  (abgr_DirectSumPr2 X Y)

  
X, Y: abgr
isBinDirectSum (abgr_DirectSumIn1 X Y)
  (abgr_DirectSumIn2 X Y) (abgr_DirectSumPr1 X Y)
  (abgr_DirectSumPr2 X Y)

    
X, Y: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn1 X Y · abgr_DirectSumPr1 X Y =
identity X
X, Y: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn2 X Y · abgr_DirectSumPr2 X Y =
identity Y
X, Y: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn1 X Y · abgr_DirectSumPr2 X Y =
to_unel X Y
X, Y: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn2 X Y · abgr_DirectSumPr1 X Y =
to_unel Y X
X, Y: abgr
to_binop (abgrdirprod X Y) (abgrdirprod X Y)
  (abgr_DirectSumPr1 X Y · abgr_DirectSumIn1 X Y)
  (abgr_DirectSumPr2 X Y · abgr_DirectSumIn2 X Y) =
identity (abgrdirprod X Y)

    
X, Y: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn1 X Y · abgr_DirectSumPr1 X Y =
identity X
 exact (abgr_DirectSumIdIn1 X Y).
    
X, Y: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn2 X Y · abgr_DirectSumPr2 X Y =
identity Y
 exact (abgr_DirectSumIdIn2 X Y).
    
X, Y: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn1 X Y · abgr_DirectSumPr2 X Y =
to_unel X Y
 exact (abgr_DirectSumUnel1 X Y).
    
X, Y: abgr
abgr_DirectSumIn2 X Y · abgr_DirectSumPr1 X Y =
to_unel Y X
 exact (abgr_DirectSumUnel2 X Y).
    
X, Y: abgr
to_binop (abgrdirprod X Y) (abgrdirprod X Y)
  (abgr_DirectSumPr1 X Y · abgr_DirectSumIn1 X Y)
  (abgr_DirectSumPr2 X Y · abgr_DirectSumIn2 X Y) =
identity (abgrdirprod X Y)
 exact (abgr_DirectSumId X Y).
  Defined.

End DirectSums.

(** ** 2.5. The additive structure *)


AdditiveStructure abgr_PreAdditive


AdditiveStructure abgr_PreAdditive

  
Zero abgr_PreAdditive
BinDirectSums abgr_PreAdditive

  
Zero abgr_PreAdditive
 exact abgr_Zero.
  
BinDirectSums abgr_PreAdditive
 
∏ a b : abgr_PreAdditive, BinDirectSum a b
 
X, Y: abgr_PreAdditive
BinDirectSum X Y
 
X, Y: abgr_PreAdditive
abgr_PreAdditive
X, Y: abgr_PreAdditive
(X --> ?co)%abgrcat
X, Y: abgr_PreAdditive
(Y --> ?co)%abgrcat
X, Y: abgr_PreAdditive
(?co --> X)%abgrcat
X, Y: abgr_PreAdditive
(?co --> Y)%abgrcat
X, Y: abgr_PreAdditive
isBinDirectSum ?i1 ?i2 ?p1 ?p2

    
X, Y: abgr_PreAdditive
abgr_PreAdditive
 exact (abgrdirprod X Y).
    
X, Y: abgr_PreAdditive
(X --> abgrdirprod X Y)%abgrcat
 exact (abgr_DirectSumIn1 X Y).
    
X, Y: abgr_PreAdditive
(Y --> abgrdirprod X Y)%abgrcat
 exact (abgr_DirectSumIn2 X Y).
    
X, Y: abgr_PreAdditive
(abgrdirprod X Y --> X)%abgrcat
 exact (abgr_DirectSumPr1 X Y).
    
X, Y: abgr_PreAdditive
(abgrdirprod X Y --> Y)%abgrcat
 exact (abgr_DirectSumPr2 X Y).
    
X, Y: abgr_PreAdditive
isBinDirectSum (abgr_DirectSumIn1 X Y)
  (abgr_DirectSumIn2 X Y) (abgr_DirectSumPr1 X Y)
  (abgr_DirectSumPr2 X Y)
 exact (abgr_isBinDirectSum X Y).
Defined.

Definition abgr_Additive : CategoryWithAdditiveStructure := make_Additive abgr_PreAdditive abgr_AdditiveStructure.


AdditiveCategory


AdditiveCategory

  
isAdditive abgr_PreAdditive

  
hasZero abgr_PreAdditive
hasBinDirectSums abgr_PreAdditive

  
hasZero abgr_PreAdditive
 
Zero abgr_PreAdditive

    exact (Additive.to_Zero abgr_Additive).
  
hasBinDirectSums abgr_PreAdditive
 
a, b: abgr_PreAdditive
∥ BinDirectSum a b ∥

    
a, b: abgr_PreAdditive
BinDirectSum a b

    apply (to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive).
Defined.

(** * 3. Kernels and Cokernels *)
(** ** 3.1. Kernels *)

Section Kernels.

  Context {A B : abgr}.
  Context (f : abelian_group_morphism A B).

  Definition abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism
    : abelian_group_category⟦carrierofasubabgr (abgr_Kernel_subabgr f), A⟧
    := binopfun_to_abelian_group_morphism (X := abgr_Kernel_subabgr f) (make_binopfun _ (abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism_isbinopfun f)).

  (** *** Composition Kernel f --> X --> Y is the zero arrow *)

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism · f =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel_subabgr f) B

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism · f =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel_subabgr f) B

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
∏ x : abgr_Kernel_subabgr f,
(abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism · f) x =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel_subabgr f) B x

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x: abgr_Kernel_subabgr f
(abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism · f) x =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel_subabgr f) B x

    apply (pr2 x).
  Qed.

  (** *** KernelIn morphism *)

  Section UniversalProperty.

    Context {C : abelian_group_category}.
    Context (h : abelian_group_morphism C A).
    Context (H : h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B).

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
c: C : abgr
f (h c) = 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
c: C : abgr
f (h c) = 0

      exact (abelian_group_morphism_eq H c).
    Qed.

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
c: C : abgr
abgr_Kernel_subabgr f

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
c: C : abgr
abgr_Kernel_subabgr f

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
c: C : abgr
A
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
c: C : abgr
(λ x : A, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f x) ?pr1

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
c: C : abgr
A
 exact (h c).
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
c: C : abgr
(λ x : A, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f x) (h c)
 exact (abgr_KernelArrowIn_map_property c).
    Defined.

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
isbinopfun abgr_KernelArrowIn_map

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
isbinopfun abgr_KernelArrowIn_map

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
∏ x x' : C,
abgr_KernelArrowIn_map (x + x') =
abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x + abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x'

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
∏ x x' : C,
abgr_KernelArrowIn_map (x + x') =
abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x + abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x'
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
x, x': C
abgr_KernelArrowIn_map (x + x') =
abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x + abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x'
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
x, x': C
pr1 (abgr_KernelArrowIn_map (x + x')) =
pr1
  (abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x +
   abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x')
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
x, x': C
transportf (λ x : A, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f x) ?p
  (pr2 (abgr_KernelArrowIn_map (x + x'))) =
pr2
  (abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x +
   abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x')

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
x, x': C
pr1 (abgr_KernelArrowIn_map (x + x')) =
pr1
  (abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x +
   abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x')
 exact (binopfunisbinopfun (h : abelian_group_morphism (C : abgr) (A : abgr)) x x').
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
x, x': C
transportf (λ x : A, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f x)
  (binopfunisbinopfun
     (h : abelian_group_morphism (C : abgr) (A : abgr))
     x x') (pr2 (abgr_KernelArrowIn_map (x + x'))) =
pr2
  (abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x +
   abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x')
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
x, x': C
isaprop
  (abgr_Kernel_subabgr f
     (pr1
        (abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x +
         abgr_KernelArrowIn_map x')))
 apply propproperty.
    Qed.

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
abelian_group_category ⟦ C, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
abelian_group_category ⟦ C, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
C → abgr_Kernel_subabgr f
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
isbinopfun ?f

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
C → abgr_Kernel_subabgr f
 exact abgr_KernelArrowIn_map.
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
isbinopfun abgr_KernelArrowIn_map
 exact abgr_KernelArrowIn_isbinopfun.
    Defined.

    (** *** Kernels *)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f
    ⟧, ψ · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f
    ⟧, ψ · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
abelian_group_category ⟦ C, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
(λ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
       abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
 ψ · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h) ?pr1

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
abelian_group_category ⟦ C, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧
 exact abgr_KernelArrowIn.
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
(λ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
       abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
 ψ · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h)
  abgr_KernelArrowIn
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
∏ x : C,
(abgr_KernelArrowIn
 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism) x = h x
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
x: C
(abgr_KernelArrowIn
 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism) x = h x
 reflexivity.
    Defined.

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
t: ∑
t1 : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
     abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
t1 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
t = abgr_Kernel_isKernel_KernelArrrow

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
t: ∑
t1 : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
     abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
t1 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
t = abgr_Kernel_isKernel_KernelArrrow

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
t: ∑
t1 : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
     abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
t1 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
isPredicate
  (λ x : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
         abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
   x · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h)
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
t: ∑
t1 : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
     abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
t1 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
pr1 t = pr1 abgr_Kernel_isKernel_KernelArrrow

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
t: ∑
t1 : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
     abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
t1 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
isPredicate
  (λ x : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
         abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
   x · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
t: ∑
t1 : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
     abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
t1 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
x: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f
⟧
isaprop (x · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h)

        apply homset_property.
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
t: ∑
t1 : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
     abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
t1 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
pr1 t = pr1 abgr_Kernel_isKernel_KernelArrrow

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
t: ∑
t1 : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
     abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
t1 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
∏ x : C,
pr1 t x = pr1 abgr_Kernel_isKernel_KernelArrrow x
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
t: ∑
t1 : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
     abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
t1 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
x: C
pr1 t x = pr1 abgr_Kernel_isKernel_KernelArrrow x

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
t: ∑
t1 : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
     abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
t1 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
x: C
isPredicate (λ x : A, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f x)
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
t: ∑
t1 : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
     abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
t1 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
x: C
pr1 (pr1 t x) =
pr1 (pr1 abgr_Kernel_isKernel_KernelArrrow x)

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
t: ∑
t1 : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
     abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
t1 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
x: C
isPredicate (λ x : A, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f x)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
t: ∑
t1 : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
     abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
t1 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
x: C
x0: A
isaprop (abgr_Kernel_subabgr f x0)

        apply propproperty.
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_morphism C A
H: h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C B
t: ∑
t1 : abelian_group_category ⟦ C,
     abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
t1 · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
x: C
pr1 (pr1 t x) =
pr1 (pr1 abgr_Kernel_isKernel_KernelArrrow x)

      exact (abelian_group_morphism_eq (pr2 t) x).
    Qed.

  End UniversalProperty.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isKernel abgr_Zero abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism
  f abgr_Kernel_eq

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isKernel abgr_Zero abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism
  f abgr_Kernel_eq

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
∏ (w : abelian_group_category)
(h : abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧),
h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w B
→ ∃! ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w,
         abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
  ψ · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
∏ (w : abelian_group_category)
(h : abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧),
h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w B
→ ∃! ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w,
         abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
  ψ · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧
H': h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w B
∃! ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w,
       abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
ψ · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧
H': h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w B
∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f
    ⟧, ψ · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧
H': h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w B
∏
t : ∑
    ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w,
        abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
    ψ · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h, t = ?x

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧
H': h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w B
∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w, abgr_Kernel_subabgr f
    ⟧, ψ · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
 exact (abgr_Kernel_isKernel_KernelArrrow h H').
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧
H': h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w B
∏
t : ∑
    ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w,
        abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
    ψ · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h,
t = abgr_Kernel_isKernel_KernelArrrow h H'
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧
H': h · f = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w B
t: ∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w,
    abgr_Kernel_subabgr f ⟧,
ψ · abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism = h
t = abgr_Kernel_isKernel_KernelArrrow h H'
 exact (abgr_Kernel_isKernel_uniqueness h H' t).
  Defined.

  Definition abgr_Kernel :
    Kernel abgr_Zero f :=
    make_Kernel (abgr_Zero) abgr_Kernel_abelian_group_morphism f abgr_Kernel_eq abgr_Kernel_isKernel.

End Kernels.


Kernels abgr_Zero


Kernels abgr_Zero

  
A, B: abelian_group_category
f: abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧
Kernel abgr_Zero f
 exact (abgr_Kernel f).
Defined.

(** ** 3.2. Cokernels *)

Section Cokernels.

  (** *** Subgroup gives an equivalence relation. *)

  Context {A B : abgr}.
  Context (f : abelian_group_morphism A B).

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
istrans (λ b1 b2 : B, ∃ a : A, f a = b1 - b2)

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
istrans (λ b1 b2 : B, ∃ a : A, f a = b1 - b2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x3

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
(∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2) → ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x3
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x3

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
(∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x3) → ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x3
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2': ∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x3

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B

y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2': ∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x3

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B

y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2': ∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
A
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2': ∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
(λ a : A, f a = x1 - x3) ?pr1

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2': ∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
A
 exact (pr1 y1' + pr1 y2').
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2': ∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
(λ a : A, f a = x1 - x3) (pr1 y1' + pr1 y2')
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2': ∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
f (pr1 y1') + f (pr1 y2') = x1 - x3

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2': ∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
x1 - x2 + f (pr1 y2') = x1 - x3
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2': ∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
x1 - x2 + (x2 - x3) = x1 - x3

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2': ∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
x1 - x2 + x2 - x3 = x1 - x3
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2': ∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
x1 + (- x2 + x2) - x3 = x1 - x3
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2': ∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
x1 + 0 - x3 = x1 - x3
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2: ∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y2': ∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x3
x1 - x3 = x1 - x3

      reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isrefl (λ b1 b2 : B, ∃ a : A, f a = b1 - b2)

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isrefl (λ b1 b2 : B, ∃ a : A, f a = b1 - b2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1: B
P: hProp
X: (∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x1) → P
P
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1: B
P: hProp
X: (∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x1) → P
∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x1
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1: B
∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x1

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1: B
A
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1: B
(λ a : A, f a = x1 - x1) ?pr1

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1: B
A
 exact 0.
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1: B
(λ a : A, f a = x1 - x1) 0
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1: B
pr1 f 0 = x1 - x1
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1: B
pr1 f 0 = 0
 apply (monoidfununel f).
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
issymm (λ b1 b2 : B, ∃ a : A, f a = b1 - b2)

f: abelian_group_morphism A B
issymm (λ b1 b2 : B, ∃ a : A, f a = b1 - b2)

x1, x2: B

∃ a : A, f a = x2 - x1

x1, x2: B

∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x1

f: abelian_group_morphism A B

∑ a : A, f a = x2 - x1

(λ a : A, f a = x2 - x1) ?pr1

x1, x2: B
x3: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x3': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
A
 exact (-pr1 x3').
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2: B
x3: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x3': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
(λ a : A, f a = x2 - x1) (- pr1 x3')
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2: B
x3: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x3': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
- f (pr1 x3') = x2 - x1

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2: B
x3: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x3': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
- (x1 - x2) = x2 - x1
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2: B
x3: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x3': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
- - x2 - x1 = x2 - x1
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2: B
x3: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x3': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
- - x2 = x2
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2: B
x3: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x3': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
- x1 = - x1

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2: B
x3: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x3': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
- - x2 = x2
 apply grinvinv.
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2: B
x3: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x3': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
- x1 = - x1
 reflexivity.
  Qed.

  Definition abgr_Cokernel_eqrel : eqrel B :=
    eqrelconstr (λ b1 b2, ∃ a, f a = b1 - b2)
                 abgr_Cokernel_eqrel_istrans abgr_Cokernel_eqrel_isrefl
                 abgr_Cokernel_eqrel_issymm.

  (** *** Construction of the quotient abelian group Y/(Im f) *)

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isbinophrel (λ b1 b2 : B, ∃ a : A, f a = b1 - b2)

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isbinophrel (λ b1 b2 : B, ∃ a : A, f a = b1 - b2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
iscomm op
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
∏ a b c : B,
(∃ a0 : A, f a0 = a - b)
→ ∃ a0 : A, f a0 = c + a - (c + b)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
iscomm op
 exact (commax B).
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
∏ a b c : B,
(∃ a0 : A, f a0 = a - b)
→ ∃ a0 : A, f a0 = c + a - (c + b)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
∃ a : A, f a = x3 + x1 - (x3 + x2)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
(∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2)
→ ∃ a : A, f a = x3 + x1 - (x3 + x2)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
∃ a : A, f a = x3 + x1 - (x3 + x2)

f: abelian_group_morphism A B

∑ a : A, f a = x3 + x1 - (x3 + x2)

f: abelian_group_morphism A B
