y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
A
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
(λ a : A, f a = x3 + x1 - (x3 + x2)) ?pr1

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
A
 exact (pr1 y1').
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
(λ a : A, f a = x3 + x1 - (x3 + x2)) (pr1 y1')
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x1 - x2 = x3 + x1 - (x3 + x2)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x1 - x2 = x3 + x1 + (- x2 - x3)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x1 - x2 = x1 + x3 + (- x2 - x3)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x1 - x2 = x1 + (x3 + (- x2 - x3))
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x1 - x2 = x1 + (- x2 - x3 + x3)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x1 - x2 = x1 + (- x2 + (- x3 + x3))
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x1 - x2 = x1 + (- x2 + 0)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x1, x2, x3: B
y1: ∃ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
y1': ∑ a : A, f a = x1 - x2
x1 - x2 = x1 - x2
 reflexivity.
  Qed.

  Definition abgr_Cokernel_abgr : abgr :=
    abgrquot (make_binopeqrel abgr_Cokernel_eqrel abgr_Cokernel_abgr_isbinoprel).

  (** *** The canonical morphism Y --> Y/(Im f) *)

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isbinopfun (setquotpr abgr_Cokernel_eqrel)

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isbinopfun (setquotpr abgr_Cokernel_eqrel)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
x, x': B
setquotpr abgr_Cokernel_eqrel (x + x') =
setquotpr abgr_Cokernel_eqrel x +
setquotpr abgr_Cokernel_eqrel x'
 reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
abelian_group_morphism B abgr_Cokernel_abgr

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
abelian_group_morphism B abgr_Cokernel_abgr

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
B → abgr_Cokernel_abgr
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isbinopfun ?f

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
B → abgr_Cokernel_abgr
 exact (setquotpr abgr_Cokernel_eqrel).
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isbinopfun (setquotpr abgr_Cokernel_eqrel)
 exact abgr_CokernelArrow_isbinopfun.
  Defined.

  (** *** CokernelOut *)

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
issurjective abgr_CokernelArrow

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
issurjective abgr_CokernelArrow

    apply issurjsetquotpr.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
f · abgr_CokernelArrow =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A abgr_Cokernel_abgr

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
f · abgr_CokernelArrow =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A abgr_Cokernel_abgr

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
∏ x : A,
(f · abgr_CokernelArrow) x =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A abgr_Cokernel_abgr x
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a: A
(f · abgr_CokernelArrow) a =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A abgr_Cokernel_abgr a

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a: A
abgr_Cokernel_eqrel ((pr11 f) a) (pr122 B)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a: A
∑ a0 : A, f a0 = (pr11 f) a - pr122 B

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a: A
A
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a: A
(λ a0 : A, f a0 = (pr11 f) a - pr122 B) ?pr1

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a: A
A
 exact a.
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a: A
(λ a0 : A, f a0 = (pr11 f) a - pr122 B) a
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a: A
f a + 0 = (pr11 f) a - pr122 B

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a: A
f a = (pr11 f) a
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a: A
0 = - pr122 B

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a: A
f a = (pr11 f) a
 reflexivity.
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a: A
0 = - pr122 B
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a: A
- pr122 B = 0
 apply (grinvunel B).
  Qed.

  Section UniversalProperty.

    Context {C : abgr}.
    Context (h : abelian_group_morphism B C).
    Context (H : f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C).

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
iscomprelfun (λ b1 b2 : B, ∃ a : A, f a = b1 - b2) h

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
iscomprelfun (λ b1 b2 : B, ∃ a : A, f a = b1 - b2) h

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
x, x': B
X: ∃ a : A, f a = x - x'
h x = h x'

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
x, x': B
X: ∃ a : A, f a = x - x'
(∑ a : A, f a = x - x') → h x = h x'
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
x, x': B
X: ∃ a : A, f a = x - x'
X': ∑ a : A, f a = x - x'
h x = h x'

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
x, x': B
X: ∃ a : A, f a = x - x'
X': ∑ a : A, f a = x - x'
h x + h (- x') = h x' + h (- x')

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
x, x': B
X: ∃ a : A, f a = x - x'
X': ∑ a : A, f a = x - x'
h x + h (- x') = h (x' - x')

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
x, x': B
X: ∃ a : A, f a = x - x'
X': ∑ a : A, f a = x - x'
h x + h (- x') = h 0

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
x, x': B
X: ∃ a : A, f a = x - x'
X': ∑ a : A, f a = x - x'
h x + h (- x') = 0

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
x, x': B
X: ∃ a : A, f a = x - x'
X': ∑ a : A, f a = x - x'
h x + h (- x') = (f · h) ?Goal0

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
x, x': B
X: ∃ a : A, f a = x - x'
X': ∑ a : A, f a = x - x'
h (x - x') = (f · h) ?Goal

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
x, x': B
X: ∃ a : A, f a = x - x'
X': ∑ a : A, f a = x - x'
x - x' = (pr11 f) ?Goal
 exact (!pr2 X').
    Qed.

    Definition abgr_CokernelOut_map :
      abgr_Cokernel_abgr → C :=
      setquotuniv (λ b1 b2 : B, ∃ a : A, f a = b1 - b2)
                  C h abgr_CokernelArrowOutUniv_iscomprelfun.

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
isbinopfun abgr_CokernelOut_map

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
isbinopfun abgr_CokernelOut_map

      exact (isbinopfun_twooutof3b _ _
              abgr_Cokernel_abelian_group_morphism_issurjective
              (binopfunisbinopfun h)
              (binopfunisbinopfun abgr_CokernelArrow)).
    Qed.

    Definition abgr_CokernelOut : abelian_group_morphism abgr_Cokernel_abgr C :=
      make_abelian_group_morphism _ abgr_CokernelOut_isbinopfun.

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
composite_abelian_group_morphism abgr_CokernelArrow
  abgr_CokernelOut = h

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
composite_abelian_group_morphism abgr_CokernelArrow
  abgr_CokernelOut = h

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
∏ x : B,
composite_abelian_group_morphism abgr_CokernelArrow
  abgr_CokernelOut x = h x
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
x: B
composite_abelian_group_morphism abgr_CokernelArrow
  abgr_CokernelOut x = h x
 reflexivity.
    Qed.

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C ⟧,
abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C ⟧,
abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C ⟧
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
(λ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
       ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h) ?pr1

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C ⟧
 exact abgr_CokernelOut.
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
(λ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
       ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h) abgr_CokernelOut
 exact abgr_CokernelOut_Comm.
    Defined.

    (** *** Cokernels *)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
t: ∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
    ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
t = make_abgr_CokernelOut

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
t: ∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
    ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
t = make_abgr_CokernelOut

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
t: ∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
    ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
isPredicate
  (λ x : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr,
         C ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · x = h)
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
t: ∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
    ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
pr1 t = pr1 make_abgr_CokernelOut

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
t: ∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
    ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
isPredicate
  (λ x : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr,
         C ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · x = h)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
t: ∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
    ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
x: abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C ⟧
isaprop (abgr_CokernelArrow · x = h)

        apply homset_property.
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
t: ∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
    ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
pr1 t = pr1 make_abgr_CokernelOut

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
t: ∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
    ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
∏ x : abgr_Cokernel_abgr,
pr1 t x = pr1 make_abgr_CokernelOut x
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
t: ∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
    ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
x: abgr_Cokernel_abgr
pr1 t x = pr1 make_abgr_CokernelOut x

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
t: ∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
    ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
x: abgr_Cokernel_abgr
hfiber abgr_CokernelArrow x
→ pr1 t x = pr1 make_abgr_CokernelOut x

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
t: ∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
    ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
x: abgr_Cokernel_abgr
hf: hfiber abgr_CokernelArrow x
pr1 t x = pr1 make_abgr_CokernelOut x
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism B C
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
t: ∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
    ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
x: abgr_Cokernel_abgr
hf: hfiber abgr_CokernelArrow x
pr1 t
  (abgr_CokernelArrow
     (hfiberpr1 abgr_CokernelArrow x hf)) =
pr1 make_abgr_CokernelOut
  (abgr_CokernelArrow
     (hfiberpr1 abgr_CokernelArrow x hf))

      exact (abelian_group_morphism_eq (pr2 t) _).
    Qed.

  End UniversalProperty.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isCokernel abgr_Zero f abgr_CokernelArrow
  abgr_Cokernel_eq

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isCokernel abgr_Zero f abgr_CokernelArrow
  abgr_Cokernel_eq

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
∏ (w : abelian_group_category)
(h : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, w ⟧),
f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A w
→ ∃! ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr,
         w ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
∏ (w : abelian_group_category)
(h : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, w ⟧),
f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A w
→ ∃! ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr,
         w ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ B, C ⟧
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
∃! ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
       ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ B, C ⟧
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C ⟧,
abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ B, C ⟧
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
∏
t : ∑
    ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
        ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h, t = ?x

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ B, C ⟧
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C ⟧,
abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
 exact (make_abgr_CokernelOut h H).
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ B, C ⟧
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
∏
t : ∑
    ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
        ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h,
t = make_abgr_CokernelOut h H
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
C: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ B, C ⟧
H: f · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A C
t: ∑
ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ abgr_Cokernel_abgr, C
    ⟧, abgr_CokernelArrow · ψ = h
t = make_abgr_CokernelOut h H
 exact (abgr_isCokernel_uniquenss h H t).
  Defined.

  Definition abgr_Cokernel : Cokernel abgr_Zero f :=
    make_Cokernel abgr_Zero f abgr_CokernelArrow abgr_Cokernel_eq abgr_isCokernel.

End Cokernels.


Cokernels abgr_Zero


Cokernels abgr_Zero

  
A, B: abelian_group_category
f: abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧
Cokernel abgr_Zero f
 exact (abgr_Cokernel f).
Defined.

(** * 4. Monics are inclusions and Epis are surjections *)

Section abgr_monics_and_epis.

(** ** 4.1. Epis are surjections *)

  Context {A B : abgr}.
  Context (f : abelian_group_morphism A B).

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
H: setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b =
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
∥ hfiber f b ∥

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
H: setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b =
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
∥ hfiber f b ∥

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
H: setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b =
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
tmp:= weqpathsinsetquot (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b 0: abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f b 0
≃ setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b = setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
∥ hfiber f b ∥

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
H: setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b =
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
tmp:= weqpathsinsetquot (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b 0: abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f b 0
≃ setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b = setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
(∑ a : A, f a = b - 0) → ∥ hfiber f b ∥
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
H: setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b =
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
tmp:= weqpathsinsetquot (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b 0: abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f b 0
≃ setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b = setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
Y: ∑ a : A, f a = b - 0
∥ hfiber f b ∥
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
H: setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b =
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
tmp:= weqpathsinsetquot (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b 0: abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f b 0
≃ setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b = setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
Y: ∑ a : A, f a = b - 0
hfiber f b
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
H: setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b =
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
tmp:= weqpathsinsetquot (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b 0: abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f b 0
≃ setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b = setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
t: A
p: f t = b - 0
hfiber f b

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
H: setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b =
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
tmp:= weqpathsinsetquot (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b 0: abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f b 0
≃ setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b = setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
t: A
p: f t = b + 0
hfiber f b
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
H: setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b =
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
tmp:= weqpathsinsetquot (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b 0: abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f b 0
≃ setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) b = setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
t: A
p: f t = b
hfiber f b

    exact (make_hfiber f t p).
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
issurjective f

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
issurjective f

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
x: B
∥ hfiber f x ∥
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
x: B
isEpi f
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
x: B
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) x =
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
x: B
isEpi f
 exact isE.
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
x: B
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) x =
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
x: B
tmp:= isE (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f) (abgr_CokernelArrow f)
  (unel_abelian_group_morphism B
     (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)): f · abgr_CokernelArrow f =
f · unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
→ abgr_CokernelArrow f = unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) x =
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
x: B
tmp:= isE (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f) (abgr_CokernelArrow f)
  (unel_abelian_group_morphism B
     (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)): f · abgr_CokernelArrow f =
f · unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
→ abgr_CokernelArrow f = unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
f · abgr_CokernelArrow f =
f
· unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
x: B
tmp:= isE (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f) (abgr_CokernelArrow f)
  (unel_abelian_group_morphism B
     (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)): f · abgr_CokernelArrow f =
f · unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
→ abgr_CokernelArrow f = unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
H: f · abgr_CokernelArrow f =
f
· unel_abelian_group_morphism B
    (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) x =
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
x: B
tmp:= isE (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f) (abgr_CokernelArrow f)
  (unel_abelian_group_morphism B
     (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)): f · abgr_CokernelArrow f =
f · unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
→ abgr_CokernelArrow f = unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
f · abgr_CokernelArrow f =
f
· unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
x: B
tmp:= isE (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f) (abgr_CokernelArrow f)
  (unel_abelian_group_morphism B
     (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)): f · abgr_CokernelArrow f =
f · unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
→ abgr_CokernelArrow f = unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f) =
f
· unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
x: B
tmp:= isE (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f) (abgr_CokernelArrow f)
  (unel_abelian_group_morphism B
     (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)): f · abgr_CokernelArrow f =
f · unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
→ abgr_CokernelArrow f = unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f) =
f · ZeroArrow abgr_Zero B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
x: B
tmp:= isE (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f) (abgr_CokernelArrow f)
  (unel_abelian_group_morphism B
     (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)): f · abgr_CokernelArrow f =
f · unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
→ abgr_CokernelArrow f = unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)

        reflexivity.
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
x: B
tmp:= isE (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f) (abgr_CokernelArrow f)
  (unel_abelian_group_morphism B
     (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)): f · abgr_CokernelArrow f =
f · unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
→ abgr_CokernelArrow f = unel_abelian_group_morphism B (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
H: f · abgr_CokernelArrow f =
f
· unel_abelian_group_morphism B
    (abgr_Cokernel_abgr f)
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) x =
setquotpr (abgr_Cokernel_eqrel f) 0

      exact (abelian_group_morphism_eq (tmp H) x).
  Qed.

(** ** 4.2. Monics are inclusions *)

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
  (nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism a1)
  (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f) =
composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
  (nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism a2)
  (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f)

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
  (nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism a1)
  (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f) =
composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
  (nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism a2)
  (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
∏
x : abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
      (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig),
composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
  (nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism a1)
  (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f) x =
composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
  (nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism a2)
  (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f) x
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
  (nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism a1)
  (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f) x =
composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
  (nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism a2)
  (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f) x
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
  (nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism a1)
  (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f) (x1,, x2) =
composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
  (nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism a2)
  (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f) (x1,, x2)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
pr1 f
  (nataddabmonoid_nataddabmonoid_to_monoid_fun a1
     (x1,, x2)) =
pr1 f
  (nataddabmonoid_nataddabmonoid_to_monoid_fun a2
     (x1,, x2))

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
pr1 f (nat_nat_to_monoid_fun a1 (x1,, x2)) =
pr1 f (nat_nat_to_monoid_fun a2 (x1,, x2))

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
pr1 f
  (nat_to_monoid_fun a1 (dirprod_pr1 (x1,, x2)) +
   nat_to_monoid_fun (- a1) (dirprod_pr2 (x1,, x2))) =
pr1 f
  (nat_to_monoid_fun a2 (dirprod_pr1 (x1,, x2)) +
   nat_to_monoid_fun (- a2) (dirprod_pr2 (x1,, x2)))
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
pr1 f
  (nat_to_monoid_fun a1 x1 +
   nat_to_monoid_fun (- a1) x2) =
pr1 f
  (nat_to_monoid_fun a2 x1 +
   nat_to_monoid_fun (- a2) x2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
f (nat_to_monoid_fun a1 x1) +
f (nat_to_monoid_fun (- a1) x2) =
pr1 f
  (nat_to_monoid_fun a2 x1 +
   nat_to_monoid_fun (- a2) x2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
f (nat_to_monoid_fun a1 x1) +
f (nat_to_monoid_fun (- a1) x2) =
f (nat_to_monoid_fun a2 x1) +
f (nat_to_monoid_fun (- a2) x2)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
pr1 f (nat_to_monoid_fun a1 x1) +
pr1 f (nat_to_monoid_fun (- a1) x2) =
pr1 f (nat_to_monoid_fun a2 x1) +
pr1 f (nat_to_monoid_fun (- a2) x2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
(f : A → B) (nat_to_monoid_fun a1 x1) +
(f : A → B) (nat_to_monoid_fun (- a1) x2) =
(f : A → B) (nat_to_monoid_fun a2 x1) +
(f : A → B) (nat_to_monoid_fun (- a2) x2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
nat_to_monoid_fun (f a1) x1 +
f (nat_to_monoid_fun (- a1) x2) =
f (nat_to_monoid_fun a2 x1) +
f (nat_to_monoid_fun (- a2) x2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
nat_to_monoid_fun (f a1) x1 +
f (nat_to_monoid_fun (- a1) x2) =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f a2) x1 +
f (nat_to_monoid_fun (- a2) x2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
nat_to_monoid_fun (f a1) x1 +
nat_to_monoid_fun (f (- a1)) x2 =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f a2) x1 +
f (nat_to_monoid_fun (- a2) x2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
nat_to_monoid_fun (f a1) x1 +
nat_to_monoid_fun (f (- a1)) x2 =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f a2) x1 +
nat_to_monoid_fun (f (- a2)) x2

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
nat_to_monoid_fun (f a1) x1 =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f a2) x1
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
nat_to_monoid_fun (f (- a1)) x2 =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f (- a2)) x2

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
nat_to_monoid_fun (f a1) x1 =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f a2) x1
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
nat_to_monoid_fun (f a1) x1 =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f a1) x1
 reflexivity.
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
nat_to_monoid_fun (f (- a1)) x2 =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f (- a2)) x2
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
f (- a1) = f (- a2)
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
e: f (- a1) = f (- a2)
nat_to_monoid_fun (f (- a1)) x2 =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f (- a2)) x2
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
f (- a1) = f (- a2)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
f a1 + f (- a1) = f a1 + f (- a2)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
f (a1 - a1) = f a1 + f (- a2)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
f 0 = f a1 + f (- a2)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
f 0 = f a2 + f (- a2)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
f 0 = f (a2 - a2)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
f 0 = f 0

        reflexivity.
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
e: f (- a1) = f (- a2)
nat_to_monoid_fun (f (- a1)) x2 =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f (- a2)) x2

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x1, x2: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
nat_to_monoid_fun (f (- a1)) x2 =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f (- a1)) x2
 reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
X, Y, Z: abmonoid
f1, f2: abelian_monoid_morphism Y Z
g: abelian_monoid_morphism X Y
H: issurjective g
g · f1 = g · f2 → f1 = f2

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
X, Y, Z: abmonoid
f1, f2: abelian_monoid_morphism Y Z
g: abelian_monoid_morphism X Y
H: issurjective g
g · f1 = g · f2 → f1 = f2

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
X, Y, Z: abmonoid
f1, f2: abelian_monoid_morphism Y Z
g: abelian_monoid_morphism X Y
H: issurjective g
e: g · f1 = g · f2
f1 = f2
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
X, Y, Z: abmonoid
f1, f2: abelian_monoid_morphism Y Z
g: abelian_monoid_morphism X Y
H: issurjective g
e: g · f1 = g · f2
∏ x : Y, f1 x = f2 x
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
X, Y, Z: abmonoid
f1, f2: abelian_monoid_morphism Y Z
g: abelian_monoid_morphism X Y
H: issurjective g
e: g · f1 = g · f2
x: Y
f1 x = f2 x

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
X, Y, Z: abmonoid
f1, f2: abelian_monoid_morphism Y Z
g: abelian_monoid_morphism X Y
H: issurjective g
e: g · f1 = g · f2
x: Y
hfiber g x → f1 x = f2 x
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
X, Y, Z: abmonoid
f1, f2: abelian_monoid_morphism Y Z
g: abelian_monoid_morphism X Y
H: issurjective g
e: g · f1 = g · f2
x: Y
hf: hfiber g x
f1 x = f2 x

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
X, Y, Z: abmonoid
f1, f2: abelian_monoid_morphism Y Z
g: abelian_monoid_morphism X Y
H: issurjective g
e: g · f1 = g · f2
x: Y
hf: hfiber g x
f1 (g (hfiberpr1 g x hf)) = f2 (g (hfiberpr1 g x hf))

    exact (abelian_monoid_morphism_eq e (hfiberpr1 _ _ hf)).
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x: hzaddabgr
f (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism a1 x) =
f (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism a2 x)

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x: hzaddabgr
f (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism a1 x) =
f (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism a2 x)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x: hzaddabgr
issurjective hz_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x: hzaddabgr
hz_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism
· composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
    (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism
       (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism a1))
    (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f) =
hz_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism
· composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
    (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism
       (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism a2))
    (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x: hzaddabgr
issurjective hz_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism
 apply issurjsetquotpr.
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x: hzaddabgr
hz_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism
· composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
    (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism
       (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism a1))
    (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f) =
hz_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism
· composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
    (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism
       (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism a2))
    (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
a1, a2: A
H: f a1 = f a2
x: hzaddabgr
nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism a1
· abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f =
nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism a2
· abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism f

      exact (nat_nat_prod_abgr_abelian_group_morphism_eq a1 a2 H).
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
isincl f

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
isincl f

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
isofhlevel 0 (h1 = h2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
h1 = h2
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
∏ t : h1 = h2, t = ?x

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
h1 = h2
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
isPredicate (λ x : A, f x = b)
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
pr1 h1 = pr1 h2

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
isPredicate (λ x : A, f x = b)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
x: A
isaprop (f x = b)

        apply setproperty.
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
pr1 h1 = pr1 h2

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
pr1 h1 + 0 = pr1 h2 + 0
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
pr1 h1 + 0 + 0 = pr1 h2 + 0 + 0

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism (pr1 h1) · f =
hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism (pr1 h2) · f

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
∏ x : hzaddabgr,
(hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism (pr1 h1) · f) x =
(hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism (pr1 h2) · f) x

      apply (hz_abgr_fun_monoifun_paths _ _ (hfiberpr2 _ _ h1 @ ! hfiberpr2 _ _ h2)).
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
∏ t : h1 = h2,
t =
subtypePath
  ((λ x : A, setproperty B (f x) b)
   :
   isPredicate (λ x : A, f x = b))
  (grrcan A 0
     (grrcan A 0
        (abelian_group_morphism_eq
           (isM hzaddabgr
              (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism
                 (pr1 h1))
              (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism
                 (pr1 h2))
              (let X := pr2 abelian_group_morphism_eq
                 in
               let X0 :=
                 λ y : ∏ x : hzaddabgr,
                       (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism
                          (pr1 h1) · f) x =
                       (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism
                          (pr1 h2) · f) x, pr1 (X y)
                 in
               let X1 :=
                 λ y : ∏ x : hzaddabgr,
                       (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism
                          (pr1 h1) · f) x =
                       (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism
                          (pr1 h2) · f) x, pr1 (X0 y)
                 in
               X1
                 (hz_abgr_fun_monoifun_paths
                    (hfiberpr1 f b h1)
                    (hfiberpr1 f b h2)
                    (hfiberpr2 f b h1 @
                     ! hfiberpr2 f b h2)))) 1%hz)))
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
t: h1 = h2
t =
subtypePath
  ((λ x : A, setproperty B (f x) b)
   :
   isPredicate (λ x : A, f x = b))
  (grrcan A 0
     (grrcan A 0
        (abelian_group_morphism_eq
           (isM hzaddabgr
              (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism
                 (pr1 h1))
              (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism
                 (pr1 h2))
              (let X := pr2 abelian_group_morphism_eq
                 in
               let X0 :=
                 λ y : ∏ x : hzaddabgr,
                       (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism
                          (pr1 h1) · f) x =
                       (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism
                          (pr1 h2) · f) x, pr1 (X y)
                 in
               let X1 :=
                 λ y : ∏ x : hzaddabgr,
                       (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism
                          (pr1 h1) · f) x =
                       (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism
                          (pr1 h2) · f) x, pr1 (X0 y)
                 in
               X1
                 (hz_abgr_fun_monoifun_paths
                    (hfiberpr1 f b h1)
                    (hfiberpr1 f b h2)
                    (hfiberpr2 f b h1 @
                     ! hfiberpr2 f b h2)))) 1%hz)))
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
t: h1 = h2
isaprop (h1 = h2)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
t: h1 = h2
isaset A
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
t: h1 = h2
isaset B

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
t: h1 = h2
isaset A
 apply setproperty.
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
b: B
h1, h2: hfiber f b
t: h1 = h2
isaset B
 apply setproperty.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
isInjective f

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
isInjective f

    exact (isweqonpathsincl f (abgr_monic_isincl isM)).
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
a1, a2: A
f a1 = f a2 → a1 = a2

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
a1, a2: A
f a1 = f a2 → a1 = a2

    exact (invweq (make_weq _ (abgr_monic_isInjective isM a1 a2))).
  Qed.

End abgr_monics_and_epis.


A, B, C: abgr
f1, f2: abelian_group_morphism A B
g: abelian_group_morphism B C
isM: isMonic (g : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, C ⟧)
monoidfuncomp f1 g = monoidfuncomp f2 g → f1 = f2


A, B, C: abgr
f1, f2: abelian_group_morphism A B
g: abelian_group_morphism B C
isM: isMonic (g : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, C ⟧)
monoidfuncomp f1 g = monoidfuncomp f2 g → f1 = f2

  
A, B, C: abgr
f1, f2: abelian_group_morphism A B
g: abelian_group_morphism B C
isM: isMonic (g : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, C ⟧)
e: monoidfuncomp f1 g = monoidfuncomp f2 g
f1 = f2
 
A, B, C: abgr
f1, f2: abelian_group_morphism A B
g: abelian_group_morphism B C
isM: isMonic (g : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, C ⟧)
e: monoidfuncomp f1 g = monoidfuncomp f2 g
∏ x : A, f1 x = f2 x
 
A, B, C: abgr
f1, f2: abelian_group_morphism A B
g: abelian_group_morphism B C
isM: isMonic (g : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, C ⟧)
e: monoidfuncomp f1 g = monoidfuncomp f2 g
x: A
f1 x = f2 x

  
A, B, C: abgr
f1, f2: abelian_group_morphism A B
g: abelian_group_morphism B C
isM: isMonic (g : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, C ⟧)
e: monoidfuncomp f1 g = monoidfuncomp f2 g
x: A
g (f1 x) = g (f2 x)

  exact (monoidfun_eq e x).
Qed.

(** * 5. Monics are kernels of their cokernels and epis are cokernels of their kernels *)
(** ** 5.1. Monics are Kernels *)

Section Monics.

  Context {A B : abgr}.
  Context (f : abelian_group_morphism A B).
  Context (isM : isMonic f).

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
iscontr (hfiber f (h c))

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
iscontr (hfiber f (h c))

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
(∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0) → iscontr (hfiber f (h c))

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
iscontr (hfiber f (h c))

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
hfiber f (h c)
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
∏ t : hfiber f (h c), t = ?x

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
hfiber f (h c)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
A
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
f ?x = h c

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
A
 exact (pr1 hf).
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
f (pr1 hf) = h c
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
h c - 0 = h c
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
h c + 0 = h c
 apply (runax B).
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
∏ t : hfiber f (h c),
t =
make_hfiber f (pr1 hf)
  (pr2 hf @
   internal_paths_rew_r B (- 0) 0
     (λ p : B, h c + p = h c) (runax B (h c))
     (grinvunel B))
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
t: hfiber f (h c)
t =
make_hfiber f (pr1 hf)
  (pr2 hf @
   internal_paths_rew_r B (- 0) 0
     (λ p : B, h c + p = h c) (runax B (h c))
     (grinvunel B))
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
t: hfiber f (h c)
isPredicate (λ x : A, f x = h c)
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
t: hfiber f (h c)
pr1 t =
pr1
  (make_hfiber f (pr1 hf)
     (pr2 hf @
      internal_paths_rew_r B (- 0) 0
        (λ p : B, h c + p = h c) (runax B (h c))
        (grinvunel B)))

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
t: hfiber f (h c)
isPredicate (λ x : A, f x = h c)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
t: hfiber f (h c)
x: A
isaprop (f x = h c)

        apply setproperty.
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
t: hfiber f (h c)
pr1 t =
pr1
  (make_hfiber f (pr1 hf)
     (pr2 hf @
      internal_paths_rew_r B (- 0) 0
        (λ p : B, h c + p = h c) (runax B (h c))
        (grinvunel B)))

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
t: hfiber f (h c)
f (pr1 t) = f (pr1 hf)

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
t: hfiber f (h c)
h c = f (pr1 hf)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
t: hfiber f (h c)
h c = h c - 0

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
t: hfiber f (h c)
h c = h c + 0
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
c: C
hf: ∑ a : A, f a = h c - 0
t: hfiber f (h c)
h c = h c
 reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
x, x': C
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
X: hfiber f (h x)
X0: hfiber f (h x')
f (pr1 X + pr1 X0) = h (x + x')

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
x, x': C
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
X: hfiber f (h x)
X0: hfiber f (h x')
f (pr1 X + pr1 X0) = h (x + x')

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
x, x': C
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
X: hfiber f (h x)
X0: hfiber f (h x')
f (pr1 X) + f (pr1 X0) = h x + h x'

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
x, x': C
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
X: hfiber f (h x)
X0: hfiber f (h x')
h x + f (pr1 X0) = h x + h x'

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
x, x': C
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
X: hfiber f (h x)
X0: hfiber f (h x')
h x + h x' = h x + h x'

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
x, x': C
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
hfiber f (h x)
→ hfiber f (h x') → hfiber f (h (x + x'))

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
x, x': C
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
hfiber f (h x)
→ hfiber f (h x') → hfiber f (h (x + x'))

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
x, x': C
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
X: hfiber f (h x)
X0: hfiber f (h x')
hfiber f (h (x + x'))

    exact (make_hfiber f (pr1 X + pr1 X0)
                      (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_mult_eq x x' h X X0)).
  Defined.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
f 0 = h 0

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
f 0 = h 0

    now rewrite !monoidfununel.
  Qed.

  Definition abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_unel (w : abgr)
             (h : abelian_group_morphism w B) : hfiber f (h 0) :=
    make_hfiber f 0 (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_unel_eq h).

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ w, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
w → A

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ w, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
w → A

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ w, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
x: w
A

    exact (hfiberpr1 _ _ (iscontrpr1 (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x))).
  Defined.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism w B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
isbinopfun (abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H)

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism w B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
isbinopfun (abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism w B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
∏ x x' : w,
abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H (x + x') =
abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H x +
abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H x'
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism w B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
x, x': w
abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H (x + x') =
abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H x +
abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H x'

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism w B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
x, x': w
t:= abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x: iscontr (hfiber f (h x))
abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H (x + x') =
abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H x +
abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H x'

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism w B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
x, x': w
t:= abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x: iscontr (hfiber f (h x))
tmp:= abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_mult x x' h
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x))
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x')): hfiber f (h (x + x'))
abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H (x + x') =
abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H x +
abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H x'

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism w B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
x, x': w
t:= abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x: iscontr (hfiber f (h x))
tmp:= abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_mult x x' h
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x))
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x')): hfiber f (h (x + x'))
abgr_monic_kernel_in w h H (x + x') =
hfiberpr1 f (h (x + x')) tmp

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism w B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
x, x': w
t:= abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x: iscontr (hfiber f (h x))
tmp:= abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_mult x x' h
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x))
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x')): hfiber f (h (x + x'))
hfiberpr1 f (h (x + x'))
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H (x + x'))) =
hfiberpr1 f (h (x + x')) tmp

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism w B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
x, x': w
t:= abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x: iscontr (hfiber f (h x))
tmp:= abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_mult x x' h
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x))
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x')): hfiber f (h (x + x'))
f
  (hfiberpr1 f (h (x + x'))
     (iscontrpr1
        (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H
           (x + x')))) =
f (hfiberpr1 f (h (x + x')) tmp)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism w B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
x, x': w
t:= abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x: iscontr (hfiber f (h x))
tmp:= abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_mult x x' h
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x))
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x')): hfiber f (h (x + x'))
h (x + x') = f (hfiberpr1 f (h (x + x')) tmp)

    exact (!hfiberpr2 _ _ tmp).
  Qed.

  Definition abgr_monic_kernel_in_abelian_group_morphism
             (w : abgr) (h: abelian_group_category⟦w, B⟧)
             (H : h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero _ _) :
    abelian_group_morphism w A := make_abelian_group_morphism _ (abgr_monic_kernel_in_isbinopfun w h H).

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
f · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A (abgr_Cokernel f)

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
f · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero A (abgr_Cokernel f)

    apply CokernelCompZero.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
abgr_monic_kernel_in_abelian_group_morphism C h H · f =
h

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
abgr_monic_kernel_in_abelian_group_morphism C h H · f =
h

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
∏ x : C,
(abgr_monic_kernel_in_abelian_group_morphism C h H · f)
  x = h x
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism C B
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
x: C
(abgr_monic_kernel_in_abelian_group_morphism C h H · f)
  x = h x

    exact (hfiberpr2 _ _ (iscontrpr1 (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x))).
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
(λ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h)
  ?pr1

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧
 exact (abgr_monic_kernel_in_abelian_group_morphism C h H).
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
(λ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h)
  (abgr_monic_kernel_in_abelian_group_morphism C h H)
 exact (abgr_monic_Kernel_isKernel_comm h H).
  Defined.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
t: ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
t = make_abgr_monic_Kernel_isKernel h H

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
t: ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
t = make_abgr_monic_Kernel_isKernel h H

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
t: ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
isPredicate
  (λ x : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, x · f = h)
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
t: ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
pr1 t = pr1 (make_abgr_monic_Kernel_isKernel h H)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
t: ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
isPredicate
  (λ x : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, x · f = h)

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
t: ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
x: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧
isaprop (x · f = h)

      apply homset_property.
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
t: ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
pr1 t = pr1 (make_abgr_monic_Kernel_isKernel h H)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
t: ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
∏ x : C,
pr1 t x = pr1 (make_abgr_monic_Kernel_isKernel h H) x
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
t: ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
x: C
pr1 t x = pr1 (make_abgr_monic_Kernel_isKernel h H) x

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
t: ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
x: C
f (pr1 t x) =
f (pr1 (make_abgr_monic_Kernel_isKernel h H) x)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
t: ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
x: C
h x = f (pr1 (make_abgr_monic_Kernel_isKernel h H) x)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ C, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero C (abgr_Cokernel f)
t: ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ C, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
x: C
f (pr1 (make_abgr_monic_Kernel_isKernel h H) x) = h x

    exact (hfiberpr2 _ _ (iscontrpr1 (abgr_monic_kernel_in_hfiber_iscontr h H x))).
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
isKernel abgr_Zero f (CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f))
  (CokernelCompZero abgr_Zero (abgr_Cokernel f))

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
isKernel abgr_Zero f (CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f))
  (CokernelCompZero abgr_Zero (abgr_Cokernel f))

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
∏ (w : abelian_group_category)
(h : abelian_group_category ⟦ w, B ⟧),
h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
→ ∃! ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧, ψ · f = h

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
∏ (w : abelian_group_category)
(h : abelian_group_category ⟦ w, B ⟧),
h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
→ ∃! ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ w, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
∃! ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧, ψ · f = h

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ w, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ w, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
∏
t : ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧, ψ · f = h,
t = ?x

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ w, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧, ψ · f = h
 exact (make_abgr_monic_Kernel_isKernel h H).
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ w, B ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero w (abgr_Cokernel f)
∏
t : ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ w, A ⟧, ψ · f = h,
t = make_abgr_monic_Kernel_isKernel h H
 exact (abgr_monic_Kernel_isKernel_uniqueness h H).
  Defined.

  Definition abgr_monic_kernel :
    Kernel abgr_Zero (CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f)) :=
    make_Kernel abgr_Zero f (CokernelArrow (abgr_Cokernel f)) (abgr_monic_Kernel_eq)
              (abgr_monic_Kernel_isKernel).

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
KernelArrow abgr_monic_kernel = f

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isM: isMonic f
KernelArrow abgr_monic_kernel = f

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

End Monics.

(** ** 5.2. Epis are Cokernels *)

Section Epis.

  Context {A B : abgr}.
  Context (f : abelian_group_morphism A B).
  Context (isE : isEpi f).

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
a: A
H: f a = 0
abgr_kernel_hsubtype f

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
a: A
H: f a = 0
abgr_kernel_hsubtype f

    exact (a,, H).
  Defined.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
∏ x : abgr_kernel_hsubtype f,
h (pr1carrier (abgr_kernel_hsubtype f) x) = 0

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
∏ x : abgr_kernel_hsubtype f,
h (pr1carrier (abgr_kernel_hsubtype f) x) = 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
x: abgr_kernel_hsubtype f
h (pr1carrier (abgr_kernel_hsubtype f) x) = 0

    exact (abelian_group_morphism_eq H x).
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
hfib1, hfib2: hfiber f b
f (pr1 hfib1 - pr1 hfib2) = 0

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
hfib1, hfib2: hfiber f b
f (pr1 hfib1 - pr1 hfib2) = 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
hfib1, hfib2: hfiber f b
f (pr1 hfib1) + f (- pr1 hfib2) = 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
hfib1, hfib2: hfiber f b
f (pr1 hfib1) + f (- pr1 hfib2) + f (pr1 hfib2) =
0 + f (pr1 hfib2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
hfib1, hfib2: hfiber f b
f (pr1 hfib1) + (f (- pr1 hfib2) + f (pr1 hfib2)) =
0 + f (pr1 hfib2)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
hfib1, hfib2: hfiber f b
f (pr1 hfib1) + f (- pr1 hfib2 + pr1 hfib2) =
0 + f (pr1 hfib2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
hfib1, hfib2: hfiber f b
f (pr1 hfib1) + f 0 = 0 + f (pr1 hfib2)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
hfib1, hfib2: hfiber f b
f (pr1 hfib1) + 0 = 0 + f (pr1 hfib2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
hfib1, hfib2: hfiber f b
f (pr1 hfib1) = 0 + f (pr1 hfib2)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
hfib1, hfib2: hfiber f b
f (pr1 hfib1) = f (pr1 hfib2)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
hfib1, hfib2: hfiber f b
b = f (pr1 hfib2)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
b: B
hfib1, hfib2: hfiber f b
b = b

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X: hfiber f b
∏ hfib : hfiber f b, h (pr1 hfib) = h (pr1 X)

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X: hfiber f b
∏ hfib : hfiber f b, h (pr1 hfib) = h (pr1 X)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X, hfib: hfiber f b
h (pr1 hfib) = h (pr1 X)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X, hfib: hfiber f b
h (pr1 hfib) - h (pr1 X) = h (pr1 X) - h (pr1 X)

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X, hfib: hfiber f b
h (pr1 hfib) - h (pr1 X) = 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X, hfib: hfiber f b
e1:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_hfibers_to_unel b hfib
  X: f (pr1 hfib - pr1 X) = 0
h (pr1 hfib) - h (pr1 X) = 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X, hfib: hfiber f b
e1:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_hfibers_to_unel b hfib
  X: f (pr1 hfib - pr1 X) = 0
tmp1:= ! group_morphism_inv h (hfiberpr1 f b X): - h (hfiberpr1 f b X) = h (- hfiberpr1 f b X)
h (pr1 hfib) - h (pr1 X) = 0
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X, hfib: hfiber f b
e1:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_hfibers_to_unel b hfib
  X: f (pr1 hfib - pr1 X) = 0
tmp1:= ! group_morphism_inv h (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X): - pr1 h (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X) =
pr1 h (- hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X)
h (pr1 hfib) - h (pr1 X) = 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X, hfib: hfiber f b
e1:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_hfibers_to_unel b hfib
  X: f (pr1 hfib - pr1 X) = 0
tmp1:= ! group_morphism_inv h (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X): - pr1 h (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X) =
pr1 h (- hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X)
h (pr1 hfib) + pr1 h (- hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X) = 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X, hfib: hfiber f b
e1:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_hfibers_to_unel b hfib
  X: f (pr1 hfib - pr1 X) = 0
tmp1:= ! group_morphism_inv h (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X): - pr1 h (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X) =
pr1 h (- hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X)
h (pr1 hfib - hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X) = 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X, hfib: hfiber f b
e1:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_hfibers_to_unel b hfib
  X: f (pr1 hfib - pr1 X) = 0
tmp1:= ! group_morphism_inv h (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X): - pr1 h (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X) =
pr1 h (- hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X)
tmp2:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_eq h H: ∏ x : abgr_kernel_hsubtype f,
h (pr1carrier (abgr_kernel_hsubtype f) x) = 0
h (pr1 hfib - hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X) = 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X, hfib: hfiber f b
e1:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_hfibers_to_unel b hfib
  X: f (pr1 hfib - pr1 X) = 0
tmp1:= ! group_morphism_inv h (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X): - pr1 h (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X) =
pr1 h (- hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X)
tmp2:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_eq h H: ∏ x : abgr_kernel_hsubtype f,
h (pr1carrier (abgr_kernel_hsubtype f) x) = 0
tmp3:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_kernel_hsubtype
  (pr1 hfib - pr1 X) e1: abgr_kernel_hsubtype f
h (pr1 hfib - hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X) = 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X, hfib: hfiber f b
e1:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_hfibers_to_unel b hfib
  X: f (pr1 hfib - pr1 X) = 0
tmp1:= ! group_morphism_inv h (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X): - pr1 h (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X) =
pr1 h (- hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X)
tmp2:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_eq h H: ∏ x : abgr_kernel_hsubtype f,
h (pr1carrier (abgr_kernel_hsubtype f) x) = 0
tmp3:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_kernel_hsubtype
  (pr1 hfib - pr1 X) e1: abgr_kernel_hsubtype f
tmp4:= tmp2 tmp3: h (pr1carrier (abgr_kernel_hsubtype f) tmp3) =
0
h (pr1 hfib - hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X) = 0
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X, hfib: hfiber f b
e1:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_hfibers_to_unel b hfib
  X: f (pr1 hfib - pr1 X) = 0
tmp1:= ! group_morphism_inv h (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X): - pr1 h (hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X) =
pr1 h (- hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X)
tmp2:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_eq h H: ∏ x : abgr_kernel_hsubtype f,
h (pr1carrier (abgr_kernel_hsubtype f) x) = 0
tmp3:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_kernel_hsubtype
  (pr1 hfib - pr1 X) e1: abgr_kernel_hsubtype f
tmp4:= tmp2 tmp3: pr1 h (pr1 hfib - pr1 X) = 0
h (pr1 hfib - hfiberpr1 (pr1 f) b X) = 0
 exact tmp4.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
∃! x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b, h (pr1 hfib) = x

b: B
∃! x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b, h (pr1 hfib) = x

hfiber f b
→ ∃! x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b, h (pr1 hfib) = x

A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =

A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X: hfiber f b
C
 exact (h (pr1 X)).
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X: hfiber f b
(λ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b, h (pr1 hfib) = x)
  (h (pr1 X))
 exact (abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_hfiber_eq h H b X).
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B

h: abelian_group_morphism A C

b: B
X: hfiber f b
∏ t : ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b, h (pr1 hfib) = x,
t =
h (pr1 X),,
abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_hfiber_eq h H b X

b: B
X: hfiber f b

  (λ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b, h (pr1 hfib) = x)

b: B
X: hfiber f b
t: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b, h (pr1 hfib) = x
pr1 t =
pr1
  (h (pr1 X),,
   abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_hfiber_eq h H b X)

C: abgr

b: B

A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X: hfiber f b
t: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b, h (pr1 hfib) = x
x: C
∏ t : hfiber f b, isofhlevel 1 (h (pr1 t) = x)

        
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X: hfiber f b
t: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b, h (pr1 hfib) = x
x: C
t0: hfiber f b
isofhlevel 1 (h (pr1 t0) = x)

        apply (setproperty C).
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
b: B
X: hfiber f b
t: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b, h (pr1 hfib) = x
pr1 t =
pr1
  (h (pr1 X),,
   abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_hfiber_eq h H b X)

      exact (! ((pr2 t) X)).
  Defined.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
b1, b2: B
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
X: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b1, h (pr1 hfib) = x
X0: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b2, h (pr1 hfib) = x
∏ hfib : hfiber f (b1 + b2),
h (pr1 hfib) = pr1 X + pr1 X0

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
b1, b2: B
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
X: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b1, h (pr1 hfib) = x
X0: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b2, h (pr1 hfib) = x
∏ hfib : hfiber f (b1 + b2),
h (pr1 hfib) = pr1 X + pr1 X0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
b1, b2: B
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
X: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b1, h (pr1 hfib) = x
X0: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b2, h (pr1 hfib) = x
hfib: hfiber f (b1 + b2)
h (pr1 hfib) = pr1 X + pr1 X0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
b1, b2: B
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
X: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b1, h (pr1 hfib) = x
X0: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b2, h (pr1 hfib) = x
hfib: hfiber f (b1 + b2)
hfiber f b1 → h (pr1 hfib) = pr1 X + pr1 X0
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
b1, b2: B
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
X: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b1, h (pr1 hfib) = x

X1: hfiber f b1
