A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
b1, b2: B
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
X: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b1, h (pr1 hfib) = x
X0: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b2, h (pr1 hfib) = x
hfib: hfiber f (b1 + b2)
X1: hfiber f b1
hfiber f b2 → h (pr1 hfib) = pr1 X + pr1 X0
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
b1, b2: B
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
X: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b1, h (pr1 hfib) = x
X0: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b2, h (pr1 hfib) = x
hfib: hfiber f (b1 + b2)
X1: hfiber f b1
X2: hfiber f b2
h (pr1 hfib) = pr1 X + pr1 X0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
b1, b2: B
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
X: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b1, h (pr1 hfib) = x
X0: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b2, h (pr1 hfib) = x
hfib: hfiber f (b1 + b2)
X1: hfiber f b1
X2: hfiber f b2
h (pr1 hfib) = h (pr1 X1) + pr1 X0
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
b1, b2: B
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
X: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b1, h (pr1 hfib) = x
X0: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b2, h (pr1 hfib) = x
hfib: hfiber f (b1 + b2)
X1: hfiber f b1
X2: hfiber f b2
h (pr1 hfib) = h (pr1 X1) + h (pr1 X2)
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
b1, b2: B
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
X: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b1, h (pr1 hfib) = x
X0: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b2, h (pr1 hfib) = x
hfib: hfiber f (b1 + b2)
X1: hfiber f b1
X2: hfiber f b2
h (pr1 hfib) = h (pr1 X1 + pr1 X2)

    exact (abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_hfiber_eq
             h H (b1 + b2) (hfiberbinop (f : abelian_group_morphism _ _) b1 b2 X1 X2) hfib).
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
b1, b2: B
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
(∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b1, h (pr1 hfib) = x)
→ (∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b2, h (pr1 hfib) = x)
  → ∑ x : C,
    ∏ hfib : hfiber f (b1 + b2), h (pr1 hfib) = x

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
b1, b2: B
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
(∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b1, h (pr1 hfib) = x)
→ (∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b2, h (pr1 hfib) = x)
  → ∑ x : C,
    ∏ hfib : hfiber f (b1 + b2), h (pr1 hfib) = x

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
b1, b2: B
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
X: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b1, h (pr1 hfib) = x
X0: ∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f b2, h (pr1 hfib) = x
∑ x : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f (b1 + b2), h (pr1 hfib) = x

    exact (pr1 X + pr1 X0 ,, abgr_epi_CokernelOut_mult_eq b1 b2 h H X X0).
  Defined.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
∏ hfib : hfiber f 0, h (pr1 hfib) = 0

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
∏ hfib : hfiber f 0, h (pr1 hfib) = 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
hfib: hfiber f 0
h (pr1 hfib) = 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
hfib: hfiber f 0
hfib_unel:= make_hfiber f 0 (monoidfununel f): hfiber f 0
h (pr1 hfib) = 0

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
hfib: hfiber f 0
hfib_unel:= make_hfiber f 0 (monoidfununel f): hfiber f 0
h (pr1 hfib_unel) = 0

    exact (monoidfununel h).
  Qed.

  Definition abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_unel {C : abgr}
             (h : abelian_group_morphism A C)
             (H : KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero _ _) :
    ( ∑ x : C, ∏ (hfib : hfiber f 0),  h (pr1 hfib) = x) :=
    tpair _ 0 (abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_unel_eq h H).

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
isbinopfun
  (λ b : B,
   pr1
     (iscontrpr1 (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H b)))

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
isbinopfun
  (λ b : B,
   pr1
     (iscontrpr1 (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H b)))

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
∏ x x' : B,
pr1
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H (x + x'))) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x)) +
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x'))

x, x': B

     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H (x + x'))) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x)) +
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x'))

h: abelian_group_morphism A C

ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
x, x': B
HH0:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_mult x x' h H
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x))
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x')): ∑ x0 : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f (x + x'), h (pr1 hfib) = x0
pr1
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H (x + x'))) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x)) +
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x'))

  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x))
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x')): ∑ x0 : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f (x + x'), h (pr1 hfib) = x0
iscontrpr1 (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H (x + x')) =
HH0

h: abelian_group_morphism A C

ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
x, x': B

  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x))
  (iscontrpr1

A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
x, x': B
HH0:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_mult x x' h H
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x))
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x')): ∑ x0 : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f (x + x'), h (pr1 hfib) = x0
tmp:= abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H (x + x'): ∃! x0 : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f (x + x'), h (pr1 hfib) = x0
iscontrpr1 tmp = HH0

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
x, x': B

  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x))
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x')): ∑ x0 : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f (x + x'), h (pr1 hfib) = x0
tmp:= abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H (x + x'): ∃! x0 : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f (x + x'), h (pr1 hfib) = x0
iscontrpr1 tmp = pr1 tmp
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
x, x': B
HH0:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_mult x x' h H
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x))
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x')): ∑ x0 : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f (x + x'), h (pr1 hfib) = x0
tmp:= abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H (x + x'): ∃! x0 : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f (x + x'), h (pr1 hfib) = x0
pr1 tmp = iscontrpr1 tmp
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
x, x': B
HH0:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_mult x x' h H
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x))
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x')): ∑ x0 : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f (x + x'), h (pr1 hfib) = x0
tmp:= abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H (x + x'): ∃! x0 : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f (x + x'), h (pr1 hfib) = x0
pr1 tmp = pr1 tmp

      reflexivity.
    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
x, x': B
HH0:= abgr_epi_cokernel_out_data_mult x x' h H
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x))
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x')): ∑ x0 : C, ∏ hfib : hfiber f (x + x'), h (pr1 hfib) = x0
HH: iscontrpr1
  (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H (x + x')) =
HH0
pr1
  (iscontrpr1
     (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H (x + x'))) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x)) +
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H x'))

    exact (base_paths _ _ HH).
  Qed.

  Definition abgr_epi_cokernel_out_abelian_group_morphism {C : abgr} (h : abelian_group_morphism A C)
             (H : KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h = ZeroArrow abgr_Zero _ _) :
    abelian_group_morphism B C := make_abelian_group_morphism _ (abgr_epi_cokernel_out_isbinopfun h H).

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · f =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) B

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · f =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) B

    apply KernelCompZero.
  Qed.

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
f · abgr_epi_cokernel_out_abelian_group_morphism h H =
h

f: abelian_group_morphism A B

C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =

C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
∏ x : A,
(f · abgr_epi_cokernel_out_abelian_group_morphism h H)
  x = h x

f: abelian_group_morphism A B

x: A
(f · abgr_epi_cokernel_out_abelian_group_morphism h H)
  x = h x
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
C: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism A C
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) C
x: A
h x =
(f · abgr_epi_cokernel_out_abelian_group_morphism h H)
  x

    exact (pr2 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_epi_CokernelOut_iscontr h H (f x)))
               (make_hfiber f x (idpath _))).
  Qed.

  ?pr1

  (abgr_epi_cokernel_out_abelian_group_morphism h H)

h x =

               (make_hfiber f x (idpath _))).

isE: isEpi f
isCokernel abgr_Zero (KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f)) f
  abgr_epi_cokernel_eq

  abgr_epi_cokernel_eq

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
∏ (w : abelian_group_category)
(h : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, w ⟧),
KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) w
→ ∃! ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, w ⟧, f · ψ = h

    
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
∏ (w : abelian_group_category)
(h : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, w ⟧),
KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) w
→ ∃! ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, w ⟧, f · ψ = h
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ A, w ⟧
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) w
∃! ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, w ⟧, f · ψ = h

isE: isEpi f
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ A, w ⟧
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =

∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, w ⟧, f · ψ = h
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ A, w ⟧
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) w
∏
t : ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, w ⟧, f · ψ = h,
t = ?x

      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ A, w ⟧
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) w
∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, w ⟧, f · ψ = h
 exact (make_abgr_epi_cokernel_isCokernel h H).
      
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ A, w ⟧
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) w
∏
t : ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, w ⟧, f · ψ = h,
t = make_abgr_epi_cokernel_isCokernel h H
 
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
w: abelian_group_category
h: abelian_group_category ⟦ A, w ⟧
H: KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f) · h =
ZeroArrow abgr_Zero (abgr_Kernel f) w
t: ∑ ψ : abelian_group_category ⟦ B, w ⟧, f · ψ = h
t = make_abgr_epi_cokernel_isCokernel h H
 exact (abgr_epi_cokernel_isCokernel_uniqueness h H t).
  Defined.

  Definition abgr_epi_cokernel :
    Cokernel abgr_Zero (KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f)) :=
    make_Cokernel abgr_Zero (KernelArrow (abgr_Kernel f)) f _ (abgr_epi_cokernel_isCokernel).

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
CokernelArrow abgr_epi_cokernel = f

  
A, B: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism A B
isE: isEpi f
CokernelArrow abgr_epi_cokernel = f

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

End Epis.

(** * 6. The category of abelian groups is an abelian category *)


AbelianPreCat


AbelianPreCat

  
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
AbelianPreCat

  
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
Data1 abelian_group_category
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
AbelianData abelian_group_category ?AD1

  
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
Data1 abelian_group_category
 
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
Zero abelian_group_category
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
BinProducts abelian_group_category
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
BinCoproducts abelian_group_category

    
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
Zero abelian_group_category
 exact abgr_Zero.
    
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
BinProducts abelian_group_category
 
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
X, Y: abelian_group_category
BinProduct abelian_group_category X Y
 exact (BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive (BinDS X Y)).
    
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
BinCoproducts abelian_group_category
 
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
X, Y: abelian_group_category
BinCoproduct X Y
 exact (BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive (BinDS X Y)).
  
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
AbelianData abelian_group_category
  (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
     ((λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
       BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
         (BinDS X Y))
      :
      BinProducts abelian_group_category)
     ((λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
       BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
         (BinDS X Y))
      :
      BinCoproducts abelian_group_category))
 
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
Data2 abelian_group_category
  (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
     ((λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
       BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
         (BinDS X Y))
      :
      BinProducts abelian_group_category)
     ((λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
       BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
         (BinDS X Y))
      :
      BinCoproducts abelian_group_category))
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
MonicsAreKernels abelian_group_category
  (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
     ((λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
       BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
         (BinDS X Y))
      :
      BinProducts abelian_group_category)
     ((λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
       BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
         (BinDS X Y))
      :
      BinCoproducts abelian_group_category)) 
  ?D2
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
EpisAreCokernels abelian_group_category
  (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
     ((λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
       BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
         (BinDS X Y))
      :
      BinProducts abelian_group_category)
     ((λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
       BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
         (BinDS X Y))
      :
      BinCoproducts abelian_group_category)) 
  ?D2

    
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
Data2 abelian_group_category
  (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
     ((λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
       BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
         (BinDS X Y))
      :
      BinProducts abelian_group_category)
     ((λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
       BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
         (BinDS X Y))
      :
      BinCoproducts abelian_group_category))
 
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
Kernels
  (to_Zero
     (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))))
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
Cokernels
  (to_Zero
     (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))))

      
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
Kernels
  (to_Zero
     (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))))
 
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
A, B: abelian_group_category
f: abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧
Kernel
  (to_Zero
     (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y)))) f
 exact (abgr_Kernel f).
      
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
Cokernels
  (to_Zero
     (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))))
 
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
A, B: abelian_group_category
f: abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧
Cokernel
  (to_Zero
     (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y)))) f
 exact (abgr_Cokernel f).
    
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
MonicsAreKernels abelian_group_category
  (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
     ((λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
       BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
         (BinDS X Y))
      :
      BinProducts abelian_group_category)
     ((λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
       BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
         (BinDS X Y))
      :
      BinCoproducts abelian_group_category))
  (make_Data2
     (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y)))
     ((λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
       (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
       abgr_Kernel f)
      :
      Kernels
        (to_Zero
           (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y))
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y)))))
     ((λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
       (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
       abgr_Cokernel f)
      :
      Cokernels
        (to_Zero
           (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y))
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y))))))
 
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
∏ (x y : abelian_group_category)
(M : Monic abelian_group_category x y),
isKernel
  (pr1
     (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y)))) M
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y))
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y)))
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Kernel f)
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Cokernel f)) x y M))
  (CokernelCompZero
     (to_Zero
        (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
           (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
            BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
              (BinDS X Y))
           (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
            BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
              (BinDS X Y))))
     (to_Cokernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y))
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y)))
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Kernel f)
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Cokernel f)) x y M))

      
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
x, y: abelian_group_category
M: Monic abelian_group_category x y
isKernel
  (pr1
     (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y)))) M
  (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y))
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y)))
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Kernel f)
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Cokernel f)) x y M))
  (CokernelCompZero
     (to_Zero
        (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
           (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
            BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
              (BinDS X Y))
           (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
            BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
              (BinDS X Y))))
     (to_Cokernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y))
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y)))
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Kernel f)
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Cokernel f)) x y M))

      exact (KernelisKernel abgr_Zero (abgr_monic_kernel _ (MonicisMonic abelian_group_category M))).
    
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
EpisAreCokernels abelian_group_category
  (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
     ((λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
       BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
         (BinDS X Y))
      :
      BinProducts abelian_group_category)
     ((λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
       BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
         (BinDS X Y))
      :
      BinCoproducts abelian_group_category))
  (make_Data2
     (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y)))
     ((λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
       (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
       abgr_Kernel f)
      :
      Kernels
        (to_Zero
           (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y))
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y)))))
     ((λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
       (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
       abgr_Cokernel f)
      :
      Cokernels
        (to_Zero
           (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y))
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y))))))
 
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
∏ (x y : abelian_group_category)
(E : Epi abelian_group_category x y),
isCokernel
  (pr1
     (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))))
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y))
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y)))
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Kernel f)
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Cokernel f)) x y E)) E
  (KernelCompZero
     (to_Zero
        (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
           (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
            BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
              (BinDS X Y))
           (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
            BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
              (BinDS X Y))))
     (to_Kernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y))
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y)))
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Kernel f)
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Cokernel f)) x y E))

      
BinDS:= to_BinDirectSums abgr_Additive: BinDirectSums abgr_Additive
x, y: abelian_group_category
E: Epi abelian_group_category x y
isCokernel
  (pr1
     (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))
        (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
         BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
           (BinDS X Y))))
  (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y))
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y)))
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Kernel f)
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Cokernel f)) x y E)) E
  (KernelCompZero
     (to_Zero
        (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
           (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
            BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
              (BinDS X Y))
           (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
            BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
              (BinDS X Y))))
     (to_Kernels
        (make_Data2
           (make_Data1 abgr_Zero
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinProduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y))
              (λ X Y : abelian_group_category,
               BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct abgr_Additive
                 (BinDS X Y)))
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Kernel f)
           (λ (A B : abelian_group_category)
            (f : abelian_group_category ⟦ A, B ⟧),
            abgr_Cokernel f)) x y E))

      exact (CokernelisCokernel abgr_Zero (abgr_epi_cokernel _ (EpiisEpi abelian_group_category E))).
Defined.

(** * 7. An elementwise criterion for isKernel *)

Section KernelCriterion.

  Context {X Y Z : abgr}.
  Context (f : abelian_group_morphism X Y).
  Context (g : abelian_group_morphism Y Z).
  Context (ZA : f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) _ _).
  Context (H : ∏ (D : hfiber g 0), ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥).
  Context (isM : isMonic f).

  Local Opaque ZeroArrow.

  Section UniversalProperty.

    Context {W : abgr}.
    Context (h : abelian_group_morphism W Y).
    Context (H' : h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z).

    
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
w': W
iscontr (hfiber f (h w'))

    
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
w': W
iscontr (hfiber f (h w'))

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = to_unel W Z
w': W
iscontr (hfiber f (h w'))

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
iscontr (hfiber f (h w'))

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
iscontr (hfiber f (h w'))

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
iscontr (hfiber f (h w'))

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) → iscontr (hfiber f (h w'))
 
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
HH: hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e))
iscontr (hfiber f (h w'))

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
iscontr (hfiber f (h w'))

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
hfiber f (h w')
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
(λ cntr : hfiber f (h w'),
 ∏ t : hfiber f (h w'), t = cntr) ?pr1

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
hfiber f (h w')
 
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
X
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
(λ x : X, f x = h w') ?pr1

        
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
X
 exact H1.
        
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
(λ x : X, f x = h w') H1
 exact H2.
      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
(λ cntr : hfiber f (h w'),
 ∏ t : hfiber f (h w'), t = cntr) (H1,, H2)
 
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
T: hfiber f (h w')
T = H1,, H2

g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥

w': W

H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
T1: X
T2: f T1 = h w'
T1,, T2 = H1,, H2

f: abelian_group_morphism X Y

w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
T1: X
T2: f T1 = h w'
pr1 (T1,, T2) = pr1 (H1,, H2)

f: abelian_group_morphism X Y

w': W

T1: X

X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
T1: X
T2: f T1 = h w'
x: X
isaprop (f x = h w')

          apply setproperty.
        
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
T1: X
T2: f T1 = h w'
pr1 (T1,, T2) = pr1 (H1,, H2)

        
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
T1: X
T2: f T1 = h w'
f T1 = f H1

        
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥

H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
T1: X
T2: f T1 = h w'

X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = 0%abgrcat
w': W
e:= abelian_group_morphism_eq H' w': (h · g) w' = 0%abgrcat w'
H'':= H (h w',, e): ∥ hfiber f (pr1 (h w',, e)) ∥
H1: X
H2: f H1 = pr1 (h w',, e)
T1: X
T2: f T1 = h w'
h w' = pr1 (h w',, e)
 reflexivity.
    Qed.

    
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
isbinopfun
  (λ w' : W : abgr,
   pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr w')))

    
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
isbinopfun
  (λ w' : W : abgr,
   pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr w')))

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
x, y: W
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr (x + y))) =
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr x)) +
pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr y))
 
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
x, y: W
f (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr (x + y)))) =
f
  (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr x)) +
   pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr y)))

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
x, y: W
f (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr (x + y)))) =
f (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr x))) +
f (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr y)))

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
x, y: W
h (x + y) =
f (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr x))) +
f (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr y)))

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
x, y: W
h x + h y =
f (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr x))) +
f (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr y)))

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
x, y: W
f (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr x))) +
f (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr y))) =
h x + h y

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
x, y: W
f (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr x))) = h x
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
x, y: W
f (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr y))) = h y

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
x, y: W
f (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr x))) = h x
 exact (pr2 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr x))).
      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
x, y: W
f (pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr y))) = h y
 exact (pr2 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr y))).
    Qed.

    
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
make_abelian_group_morphism
  (λ w' : W : abgr,
   pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr w')))
  abgr_isKernel_Criteria_isbinopfun · f = h

    
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
make_abelian_group_morphism
  (λ w' : W : abgr,
   pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr w')))
  abgr_isKernel_Criteria_isbinopfun · f = h

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
∏ x : W,
(make_abelian_group_morphism
   (λ w' : W,
    pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr w')))
   abgr_isKernel_Criteria_isbinopfun · f) x = h x
 
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
x: W
(make_abelian_group_morphism
   (λ w' : W,
    pr1 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr w')))
   abgr_isKernel_Criteria_isbinopfun · f) x = h x

      exact (pr2 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr x))).
    Qed.

    Definition make_abgr_isKernel_Criteria :
      ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦W, X⟧, ψ · f = h
      := _ ,, abgr_isKernel_Criteria_comm.

    
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
t: ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ W, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
t = make_abgr_isKernel_Criteria

    
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
t: ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ W, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
t = make_abgr_isKernel_Criteria

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
t: ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ W, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
isPredicate (λ x : abgr_Abelian ⟦ W, X ⟧, x · f = h)
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
t: ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ W, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
pr1 t = pr1 make_abgr_isKernel_Criteria

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
t: ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ W, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
isPredicate (λ x : abgr_Abelian ⟦ W, X ⟧, x · f = h)

        
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
t: ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ W, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
x: abgr_Abelian ⟦ W, X ⟧
isaprop (x · f = h)

        apply homset_property.
      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
t: ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ W, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
pr1 t = pr1 make_abgr_isKernel_Criteria

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
t: ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ W, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
∏ x : W, pr1 t x = pr1 make_abgr_isKernel_Criteria x
 
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
t: ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ W, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
x: W
pr1 t x = pr1 make_abgr_isKernel_Criteria x

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
t: ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ W, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
x: W
f (pr1 t x) = f (pr1 make_abgr_isKernel_Criteria x)

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
W: abgr
h: abelian_group_morphism W Y
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) W Z
t: ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ W, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
x: W
f (pr1 make_abgr_isKernel_Criteria x) = h x

      exact (pr2 (iscontrpr1 (abgr_isKernel_iscontr x))).
    Qed.

  End UniversalProperty.

  
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
isKernel (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) f g ZA

  
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
isKernel (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) f g ZA

    
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
∏ (w : abgr_Abelian) (h : abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, Y ⟧),
h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) w Z
→ ∃! ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, X ⟧, ψ · f = h

    
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
∏ (w : abgr_Abelian) (h : abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, Y ⟧),
h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) w Z
→ ∃! ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
 
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr_Abelian
h: abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, Y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) w Z
∃! ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
 
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr_Abelian
h: abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, Y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) w Z
∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr_Abelian
h: abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, Y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) w Z
∏ t : ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, X ⟧, ψ · f = h, t = ?x

      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr_Abelian
h: abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, Y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) w Z
∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
 exact (make_abgr_isKernel_Criteria h H').
      
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr_Abelian
h: abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, Y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) w Z
∏ t : ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, X ⟧, ψ · f = h,
t = make_abgr_isKernel_Criteria h H'
 
X, Y, Z: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
g: abelian_group_morphism Y Z
ZA: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) X Z
H: ∏ D : hfiber g 0, ∥ hfiber f (pr1 D) ∥
isM: isMonic f
w: abgr_Abelian
h: abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, Y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero abgr_Abelian) w Z
t: ∑ ψ : abgr_Abelian ⟦ w, X ⟧, ψ · f = h
t = make_abgr_isKernel_Criteria h H'
 exact (abgr_isKernel_Criteria_uniqueness h H' t).
  Defined.

End KernelCriterion.
